The '''XL 5115 engine''' was a simple but speedy [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] engine designed by [[Exelbrok/Legends|Exelbrok]].

[[Ody Mandrell/Legends|Ody Mandrell]] used an XL 5115 in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. In the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|race]] of that year, one of Mandrell's [[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|pit droids]], [[DUM-4/Legends|DUM-4]], wrecked the engine by walking in front of it when Ody took a pit stop. DUM-4 was sucked in, and the engine exploded.

==Characteristics==
The XL 5115 was a good all around podracer with above average acceleration and low top speed. However Ody Mandrell's model was fitted with a more advanced repair system.
